nasb.text: So he ran on ahead and climbed up into a sycamore tree in order to see Him, for He was about to pass through that way.

esv.text: So he ran on ahead and climbed up into a sycamore tree to see him, for he was about to pass that way.

cnv.text: 於是他跑到前頭，爬上一棵桑樹，要看看耶穌，因為耶穌就要從那裡經過。

ccb.text: 他便跑到前面，爬上一棵桑树观看，因为耶稣会从那里经过。

csbs.text: 于是他跑到前头，爬上一棵桑树，要看耶稣，因为耶稣就要从那里经过。
